positive: Minimalist, highly contrasted vector-style illustration of a stylized wolf howling at a full moon. The wolf should be in a dramatic silhouette, embracing a dynamic, flowing composition. Geometric line work and simple, bold shapes dominate the design. Use a limited color palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant silver, and stark off-white. The moon should be a perfect circle, radiating strong, ethereal light. The style should evoke mid-century modern poster art combined with neo-traditional tattoo flash art. Central composition, perfect symmetry, isolated on a solid background.
negative: blur, text, low resolution, signature, watermark, messy, fuzzy, noise, artifacts, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoonish, photorealistic, grayer tones, gradient, logo
